title: onosma asperrima
intro: Onosma asperrima, also known as Asperula, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Onosma asperrima include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Onosma asperrima is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in capsule or tincture form in herbal supplement stores.
